scene: Stan, a simple round-headed dot-eyed stickman, gazing up at a huge flat dark navy night sky full of simple white star dots, big black caps MADE OF DEAD STARS? Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, thick wobbly outlines, no 3D.

A big glowing yellow star with little element labels C, O and Fe being cooked inside it, flat dark navy space around it, big black caps FORGED IN STARS. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.

A star bursting apart into scattered dust and sparks flying outward across a flat dark navy sky, big black caps THEN THEY DIED. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.

Glowing stardust swirling down and forming into the shape of the round-headed stickman, flat dark navy sky with star dots, big black caps AND BECAME YOU. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
